description: This Java class processes environment variables during Spring Boot application startup to normalize Neon or platform-provided PostgreSQL connection strings, converting various URL formats into a standard JDBC URL and extracting credentials when necessary. It ensures proper configuration of the DataSource based on environment variables, supporting different URL schemes and maintaining existing explicit configurations.

classes.name: NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor
classes.description: A class implementing EnvironmentPostProcessor to modify the Spring environment during startup, specifically to parse and normalize PostgreSQL connection URLs provided via environment variables.

methods.name: postProcessEnvironment
methods.description: Modifies the environment properties by converting Neon/Heroku-style DATABASE_URLs into JDBC URLs and extracting credentials if not explicitly set.

methods.name: extractUser
methods.description: Extracts the username from the URI user info component.

methods.name: extractPassword
methods.description: Extracts the password from the URI user info component.

methods.name: urlDecode
methods.description: URL-decodes a string, used for decoding user info components.

methods.name: getOrder
methods.description: Returns the order in which this EnvironmentPostProcessor runs, set to run early.
